title: Weather atlas spine and ION-derived Cosmos operating system
summary: Added a deterministic water-world weather atlas generator, wired it into the main ProceduralEarth shader, exposed controls, and created a Cosmos domain/agent/queue workflow adapted from the ION math sandbox.
known_limits: The atlas is still a deterministic procedural fallback, not yet live NOAA/NASA/Copernicus data.
The shader is build-validated but not browser screenshot-validated in this environment.
Cloud regime layer heights are still constrained by the existing local cloud volume box. Full orbital atmosphere/cloud LOD remains queued.
The current lint warnings are non-blocking React hook/fast-refresh warnings retained from the existing application structure.
